title: OWK Contributor Badge System

badges.label: First Claim
badges.criterion: Awarded when a contributor successfully claims their first bounty.

badges.label: Merge Maker
badges.criterion: Awarded when a contributor ships their first accepted merge.

badges.label: Five Shipments
badges.criterion: Awarded when a contributor completes five accepted shipments.

badges.label: Seven Day Streak
badges.criterion: Awarded for a seven day shipping or review streak.

badges.label: Security Sentinel
badges.criterion: Awarded for accepted security review, vulnerability fix, or safety hardening work.

badges.label: Docs Steward
badges.criterion: Awarded for documentation that makes a mechanism easier to use or maintain.

badges.label: Design Partner
badges.criterion: Awarded for reusable design systems, visual assets, and polished contributor-facing UX.

badges.label: Onchain Verifier
badges.criterion: Awarded for work that verifies payment, attestations, proofs, or chain-facing records.

validation: standalone SVG with no scripts, external href references, or remote assets
each SVG includes title, desc, role=img, and aria-label
